summary: Fixed all critical and warning issues from the review: deleted dead App.tsx.bak file, inlined the no-op handleFeatureChange wrapper by passing setSelectedFeature directly, added adaptive cost precision (toFixed(4) for sub-cent amounts) in feature-detail, added Number.isFinite guard on timeline cost display, added a useEffect reset guard when the selected feature is removed from the list mid-session, and prevented the polling interval from firing while SSE is active by tracking SSE state in a ref.
